basics.name: Sophia Jones
basics.label: PhD Candidate – Reinforcement Learning
basics.summary: Researching reinforcement learning with graph based methods in the UKRI CDT for Accountable, Responsible, and Transparent AI, under the supervision of Prof Özgür Şimşek.

work.name: Wayfair
work.summary: Developed forecasting systems and optimization algorithms for delivery operations.
highlights: Created a forecasting system to estimate the optimal delivery fleet size, achieving over 90% accuracy.
Developed a novel algorithm using routing heuristics to find geographically optimal locations for delivery hubs.

work.name: Lloyds Banking Group
work.summary: Developed models to predict the total loss the bank may incur due to customers defaulting on mortgage payments.

work.name: Simply Rational
work.summary: Consulted on an explainable credit risk prediction project.

awards.title: Deb Bose Prize for Best Mathematical Dissertation
awards.summary: Awarded for outstanding performance in mathematical dissertation.

projects.name: Reinforcement Learning with Graph-based Methods
projects.summary: Research project aiming to achieve more efficient value function approximation and agent explainability at a policy level.
highlights: Exploiting complex graphical structures generated by RL agent-environment interactions
Developing novel algorithms for improved RL performance
